titleStmt.title: SII 20.3: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 3. (B.K. No. 39 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a slab fixed in the left wall of the śaṁkha-basti at Basti-Baṇa.

summary.p: It registers a gift of 500 nivarttanas of land to the north of Puligere-nagara, for the worship of and offerings to the God Śaṁkha-Jinēndra, by Durgaśakti, son of Kundaśakti and grandson of Vijayaśakti, of the Sēndra lineage.
Published in Ind. Ant., Vol. VII, pp. 106-07, text lines 51-61.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyatiśayajinairbbhāsurassuravanditaḥ śrīmānjinapatiḥ sṛṣṭērā
dēḥ karttā dayōdayaḥ . Iha hi svasti . cāḷukyapṛthvīvallabhakuḷatiḷakēṣu bahuṣvatītēṣu raṇaparākramāṅkamahārājōbhavattadrā
jatanayaḥ rājitanayō vivarddhitaiśvaryyaścatussamudrāntasnātaturaṅgēbhapadātisēnāsamūhaḥ Eṟeyammanāmadhēyaḥ śrīvallabhōbhavat .
Api ca . śāsatīmāṁ samudrāntāṁ vasudhāṁ vasudhādhipē . satyāśrayamahārājē rājatsatyasamanvitē . bhujagēṁdrānvayasēndrāvanīṁdrasantatau
Anēkanṛpasattamēṣvatītēṣu tatkuḷagaganacaṁdramāḥ bahusamaravijayalabdhapatākāvabhāsitadigantarāḷavaḷayaḥ vijayaśaktirnnāma nṛpatirbba
bhūva . tatsūnuruditataruṇadivākarakarasamaprabhaḥ sauryyadhairyyasatvaguṇōpapannaḥ sāmantabṛndamauḷimāḷāvalīḍhacaraṇaḥ kundaśa
ktirnnāma rājābhūttasya priyatanayaḥ . Advitīyapuruṣākārasaṁpannaḥ . dhammārtthakāmapradānaḥ Anēkaraṇavijayavīrapatākāgrahaṇā
rtthakīrttiḥ . tēna durggaśaktināmadhēyēna śaṁkhajinēṁdracaityanityapūjārtthaṁ puṇyābhivṛddhayē ca . puligeṟenāmanagarasyōttarapārśvē paṁcaśatanivarttanaṁ parimā
ṇakṣētraṁ dattaṁ . tasya sīmā samākhyāyatē . pūrvataḥ kinnarikṣētraṁ . pāvakadiśi jyēṣṭhaliṁgabhūmiḥ . dakṣiṇataḥ ghaṭikākṣētraṁ . nairṛtyāṁ diśi daṁ
1. This and Nos. 4-7 below are engraved in characters of about the 10th-11th cent. A.D. They appear to be later copies of earlier copper-plate grants.

ḍigaśrēṣṭhibhūmiḥ paścimataḥ rāmēśvarakṣētraṁ . vāyavyāṁ hōbēśvarakṣētraṁ . Uttarataḥ sindēśvarakṣētraṁ . Īśānyāṁ diśi bhaṭārikṣētraṁ . taddakṣiṇataḥ pūrvōkta kinna
rikṣētraṁ . dēvasvaṁ viṣaṁ lōkē viṣanna viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
